calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Establishing Right To Property Deposited With County Treasurer And For Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Carol Cassidy and Lane Cassidy (Petitioners).

Mr. Mangini addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to the Lane Cassidy's relationship with the Decedent and the reasons why the Petitioners were not in contact with the Attorney for the Personal Representative. The Court granted both petitions (orders for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
